falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score rises above 50 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 50 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key resistance level would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, falsifying the HOLD signal's implication of a potential bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average on three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume spike would indicate a shift in market dynamics, invalidating the current pattern's assumption of consolidation and proving the HOLD verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
